description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a straight, cylindrical wooden handle with a slightly worn, reddish-brown finish. The head is made of dark metal and is rectangular, with a broad, flat striking face and a perpendicular peen on the opposite side, suggesting a sledge or engineer's hammer style. The handle shows visible signs of use, including discoloration and minor surface abrasions, particularly near the base. The metal head appears solid and heavy, with some surface irregularities and a matte, slightly rough texture. No visible brand markings or logos are present on either the handle or the head. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty tasks in urban maintenance or construction settings.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a worn wooden handle and a solid, rectangular metal head, showing signs of use and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the broad, flat face of the metal head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical handle and the rectangular profile of the metal head, with the peen visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the handle and the back of the hammer head, including the peen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's length and the side of the metal head, with surface wear visible.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a cylindrical shape, slightly worn and discolored, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular steel head with a broad flat striking face and a perpendicular peen, resembling a sledge or engineer's hammer
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible discoloration and abrasions on the handle, minor surface irregularities on the metal head
